error.install_llm_deps: Error: install LLM dependencies (uv sync --extra llm).
pipeline.insufficient_audio: Error: not enough audio in buffer.
error.pipewire_fix: Fix: sudo dnf install pipewire pipewire-utils
error.pipewire_no_audio_devices: PipeWire is running, but no real audio devices were detected. Only dummy/null nodes are available. Check the host system, WirePlumber, and your mic/output devices.
error.pipewire_devices_fix: Check on the host: wpctl status, pactl list short sources, systemctl --user status wireplumber pipewire. Make sure your mic/output devices are actually visible to PipeWire.
warning.low_disk_space: Low disk space (<1 GB free). Consider freeing space.
error.no_disk_space: Insufficient disk space (<200 MB free). Free space and retry.
error.no_network: Network unreachable. Cannot call cloud LLM.
error.no_llm_backend: No LLM backend. Set an API key (keyring set voiceforge anthropic) or start Ollama (ollama serve).
error.ollama_not_running: Ollama is not running. Start it with: ollama serve
error.ollama_suggestion: Try Ollama for offline: voiceforge status
error.rag_deps: Install RAG dependencies: uv sync --extra rag
listen.streaming_on: Streaming STT on — partial/final in terminal.
listen.live_summary_on: Live summary on — every {interval} s for last {interval} s.
meeting.listening_hint: Listening... Press Ctrl+C to stop and analyze.
install_service.enabled_and_started: Service installed, enabled and started. Logs: journalctl --user -u voiceforge -f
export.format_md_or_pdf: Format must be md or pdf.
export.clipboard_unavailable: No clipboard tool (wl-copy or xclip). Printing to stdout.
export.pdf_install: For PDF install pandoc and pdflatex (or: pandoc -o out.pdf session.md).
history.no_action_items: No action items. Run analyze on sessions with tasks.
history.no_sessions_period: No sessions in the specified period.
history.no_sessions: No saved sessions. Run voiceforge analyze.
backup.no_files: No DB files found to backup.
doctor.ram_fail: Low RAM: {gb:.1f} GB (need ~2+ GB for pipeline)
doctor.cmd_help: Diagnostics: check components, API keys, models, RAM.
calendar.poll_help: Poll CalDAV for events that started in the last N minutes (keyring: caldav_url, caldav_username, caldav_password).
calendar.poll_no_events: No events started in the last {minutes} min.
calendar.poll_events: Events started in the last {minutes} min:
feedback.diarization_skipped_hf: ⚠ Speaker labels unavailable: HuggingFace token missing. Fix: keyring set voiceforge huggingface
feedback.diarization_skipped_ram: ⚠ Speaker labels unavailable: insufficient RAM ({available_gb} GB < {required_gb} GB required). Fix: keyring set voiceforge huggingface
feedback.rag_no_index: ℹ No knowledge base indexed. Use: voiceforge index
feedback.no_speech_skip: Analysis skipped: no speech detected, LLM was not called.
setup.welcome_first_run: Welcome to VoiceForge! Run `voiceforge setup` for guided configuration.
doctor.models_pyannote_missing: pyannote: not cached or no HF token
doctor.model_recommendation_oom: Recommended model: {recommended} ({available_gb} GB RAM). Current: {current} (may cause OOM)
